info.name: TeamFlow API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for TeamFlow Spring Boot API with JWT authentication

request.description: Register a new user. **Public endpoint** - No authentication required. Returns JWT token.
Login with email and password. **Public endpoint** - No authentication required. Returns JWT token that will be automatically saved to collection variables.
Get all projects. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Get project details by ID. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Create a new project. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required. Status: ACTIVE | ARCHIVED. Type: PERSONAL | TEAM.
Update an existing project. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Delete a project (soft delete). **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Get all columns for a specific project. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Get column details by ID. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Create a new column in a project. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required. orderIndex determines display order.
Update an existing column. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Delete a column (soft delete). **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Get all tasks for a specific column. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Get task details by ID. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.

body.raw:
{
    "title": "Implement user authentication",
    "description": "Add JWT-based authentication to the API",
    "priority": "HIGH",
    "dueDate": "2026-02-15",
    "isBlocked": false
}

request.description: Create a new task in a column. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required. Priority: LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH.
Update an existing task. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Move a task to a different column. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required. Use targetColumnId query parameter.
Delete a task (soft delete). **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Get all subtasks for a specific task. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Create a new subtask for a task. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Update an existing subtask. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Delete a subtask (soft delete). **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Get all comments for a specific task. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Create a new comment on a task. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required. Requires userId as query parameter.
Update an existing comment. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Delete a comment (soft delete). **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Get all members of a specific project. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Add a member to a project. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required. RoleInProject: MANAGER | MEMBER.
Update a member's role in a project. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Remove a member from a project (soft delete). **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Get all assignments for a specific task. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Assign a user to a task. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required. RoleInTask: RESPONSABLE | CONTRIBUTOR | OBSERVER.
Update an assignment's role. **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
Remove a user assignment from a task (soft delete). **Requires authentication** - Bearer token required.
